item.title: Why is Entero Healthcare Solutions Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 18-Mar, Entero Healthcare Solutions Ltd witnessed a significant price rise of 8.62%, closing at ₹1,113.00, driven by robust quarterly performance, healthy long-term growth metrics, and increased investor participation. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Pee Cee Cosma Sope Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 18-Mar, Pee Cee Cosma Sope Ltd witnessed a significant decline in its share price, closing at ₹295.30, down ₹15.9 or 5.11% from the previous close. This drop reflects a continuation of the stock’s recent downward trend, underperforming both its sector and the broader market benchmarks. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is Trigyn Technologies Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 18-Mar, Trigyn Technologies Ltd witnessed a significant uptick in its share price, rising by 9.11% to close at ₹50.20. This sharp increase comes after two consecutive days of gains, reflecting renewed investor enthusiasm despite the stock’s longer-term underperformance relative to the broader market. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Why is IGC Industries Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 18-Mar, IGC Industries Ltd has recorded a modest rise in its share price, climbing 3.83% to ₹2.17.
